meta.title: Joining the Navy - Sandboxx Interview
meta.description:
Our CEO Sam Meek talks to Kevin,a Navy Sailor whose about to start boot camp. They discuss why he joined the Navy, tips on studying for the ASVAB as well as his aspirations for the future.
Kevin also discusses his preparation for boot camp, the importance of his support network and  his tips for success within the Navy.

*We apologise for the connection quality*

If you or a loved one are joining the Navy, make it easier to stay connected at every step of the journey with the Sandboxx app:  https://link.sandboxx.us/youtube
